title: evolvulus passerinoides
intro: Evolvulus passerinoides, also known as Dwarf Blue Daze, is a flowering plant species in the family Convolvulaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is known for its vibrant blue flowers. Evolvulus passerinoides has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may contribute to various health benefits, including wound healing and reduced inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and may be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
